scripts.dev:electron:app: wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron electron/services/main.mjs
scripts.dev:electron: npm run rebuild:native && concurrently -k -n WEB,ELECTRON -c green,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:electron:app"
scripts.postinstall: npm run rebuild:native || node -e "console.warn('Skipping native rebuild: install Visual Studio Build Tools (Desktop development with C++) to compile better-sqlite3 for Electron.')"
